english translation text: O’ MASTER ABBAS, CALL ME TO YOUR SHRINE, I AM FAR FROM YOU, CALL ME TO YOUR SHRINE

urdu transliteration text:
Shikwa Bhi Tumhi Se Hai Shikayat Bhi Tumhi Se, Har Baat Me Keh Sakta -Nahi Mola Kisi Se
Ek Baar To Roze Pe Bulalijie Aqa, Dil Ghamse Bhara Hai, Tumhe Aakar Me Sunawoo
@HujjatELC
Ya Hazrate Abbas, Roze Pe Bulalo – O Master Abbas Call Me To Your Shrine
english translation text:
WE COMPLAIN TO YOU, AND ONLY TO YOU,
I CAN’T TELL ALL MY PROBLEMS O’ MASTER, TO ANYONE ELSE,
CALL ME TO YOUR SHRINE O’ MASTER, ATLEAST ONCE,
THE HEART IS FULL OF SORROW, LET ME EXPRESS MY GRIEF TO YOU

urdu transliteration text:
Dunya Me Kahan Tere Siwa Koi Sahara, Jeete Ji Agar Dekha -Nahi Roza Tumhara
To Door Me Tumse Nahi Reh Paaunga Zinda, Dil Ghamse Bhara Hai, Tumhe Aakar Me Sunawoo
@HujjatELC
Ya Hazrate Abbas, Roze Pe Bulalo – O Master Abbas Call Me To Your Shrine
english translation text:
YOU ARE THE SUPPORT FOR US,
IF I DON’T SEE YOUR SHRINE DURING MY LIFETIME,
I WILL NOT BE ABLE TO LIVE IF I AM FAR FROM YOU,
THE HEART IS FULL OF SORROW, LET ME EXPRESS MY GRIEF TO YOU

urdu transliteration text:
Roro Ke Tere Roze Ki Jaali Ko Bhigowu, Chokat Ko Teri Baaraha -Ashkon Se Me Dhowu
Ay Baabe Hawij Karo Armaan Ye Pura, Dil Ghamse Bhara Hai, Tumhe Aakar Me Sunawoo
O’ BAAB E HAWAIJ, FULFIL MY DESIRES
@HujjatELC
Ya Hazrate Abbas, Roze Pe Bulalo – O Master Abbas Call Me To Your Shrine
english translation text:
I WILL WEEP TILL THE FRAME OF YOUR TOMBSTONE IS COVERED WITH MY TEARS,
UNTIL YOUR GROUNDS ARE WASHED WITH MY TEARS
THE HEART IS FULL OF SORROW, LET ME EXPRESS MY GRIEF TO YOU

urdu transliteration text:
Deta Hon Tumhe Wasta Zainab Ki Rida Ka, Aur Shaame Ghariban Me -Sakina Ki Sada Ka
Sunlo Meri Faryad Ko Abbas Khudara, Dil Ghamse Bhara Hai, Tumhe Aakar Me Sunawoo
@HujjatELC
Ya Hazrate Abbas, Roze Pe Bulalo – O Master Abbas Call Me To Your Shrine
english translation text:
FOR THE SAKE OF THE VEIL OF ZAINAB,
FOR THE SAKE OF THE CRIES OF SAKINA ON SHAAM E GHAREEBAN,
PLEASE LISTEN TO MY PLEA FOR THE SAKE OF THE ALMIGHTY,
THE HEART IS FULL OF SORROW, LET ME EXPRESS MY GRIEF TO YOU

urdu transliteration text:
Ay Baabe Hawaij Tumhe Mohsin Ki Qasam Hai, Abbas Tumhe Asghar E -Kamsin Ki Qasam Hai
Bas Dedo Mujhe Own O Mohamad Ka Hi Sadqa, Dil Ghamse Bhara Hai, Tumhe Aakar Me Sunawoo
@HujjatELC
Ya Hazrate Abbas, Roze Pe Bulalo – O Master Abbas Call Me To Your Shrine
english translation text:
O’ BAAB E HAWAIJ, FOR THE SAKE OF MOHSIN,
ABBAS, FOR THE SAKE OF THE YOUNG ASGHER,
PLEASE GIVE, FOR THE SAKE OF OWN AND MUHAMMAD,
THE HEART IS FULL OF SORROW, LET ME EXPRESS MY GRIEF TO YOU

urdu transliteration text:
Ab Wasta Us Pehlu Shikasta Ka Hai Tumko, Aakhir Me Bas Ab Wasta -Zahra Ka Hai Tumko
Roze Pe Bulakar Suno Salman Se Noha, Dil Ghamse Bhara Hai, Tumhe Aakar Me Sunawoo
@HujjatELC
Ya Hazrate Abbas, Roze Pe Bulalo – O Master Abbas Call Me To Your Shrine
english translation text:
FOR THE SAKE OF THE BROKEN RIB,
AND FINALLY, FOR THE SAKE OF ZAHRA
LISTEN TO THE LAMENTATIONS FROM ‘SALMAN’ (the poet) AT YOUR SHRINE,
THE HEART IS FULL OF SORROW, LET ME EXPRESS MY GRIEF TO YOU
